auth.signInSubtitle: Use your administrator email and password.
auth.mfaSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.devNote: Local dev login: workspace 'demo', owner@demo.com / tikflow-demo-2026.

errors.accountLocked: This account is temporarily locked. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.accountInactive: This account is not active. Contact your administrator.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Your operations command centre. The numbers will appear here once you connect a router and add your first subscribers.

empty.title: Nothing here yet
empty.body: Connect your first MikroTik router to start importing PPPoE secrets and seeing live activity.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your workspace, team, and integrations.

general.cardSubtitle: Workspace identity, defaults, and billing contact.
general.slugHelp: Used in URLs and sign-in. Slugs are permanent — contact support to change.
general.name: Workspace name
general.nameHelp: Shown in the top bar and on customer-facing documents.
general.billingEmailHelp: Invoices and payment receipts for TikFlow itself are sent here.
general.timezoneHelp: Used to schedule billing runs, dunning reminders, and reports.
general.currencyHelp: Default currency for plans, invoices, and ledger postings.
general.savedDesc: Your workspace defaults have been updated.

errors.forbidden: Only workspace owners and admins can change these settings.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

members.cardSubtitle: Everyone who can sign in to this workspace.
members.empty: No members yet. Add your first teammate to get started.

add.cardSubtitle: Create an account, assign roles, and share the initial password.
add.emailHelp: The address they'll use to sign in.
add.passwordHelp: At least 12 characters with upper, lower, and a digit. Share securely — they should change it after first sign-in.
add.rolesHelp: Pick one or more. You can change these later.

shareNote.title: Share the password securely
shareNote.body: Use a password manager, encrypted message, or hand it over in person. TikFlow does not email it.

errors.forbidden: Only workspace owners and admins can add members.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

detail.justCreatedBody: {email} can now sign in. Share their initial password if you haven't already.
detail.rolesSubtitle: Roles determine what this member can see and do.
detail.assignedRolesHelp: A member must keep at least one role.
detail.statusSubtitle: Suspend a member to immediately block sign-in without losing their account or history.
detail.isActive: This member is active and can sign in.
detail.isSuspended: This member is suspended and cannot sign in.

selfWarning.title: You're editing your own account
selfWarning.body: You cannot suspend yourself — ask another owner or admin if you need that.

errors.title: Couldn't save
errors.validation: Some of the values are invalid.
errors.forbidden: Only workspace owners and admins can change member settings.
errors.lastOwner: You can't remove the last owner of the workspace.
errors.selfSuspend: You can't suspend your own account.
errors.unknownRole: One of the selected roles is invalid.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

roles.cardSubtitle: What each role can do. System roles ship with TikFlow and can't be edited.
roles.customComingSoon: Custom role creation is coming in a later release.

apiKeys.cardSubtitle: Tokens for the public API, webhooks, and integrations. Treat them like passwords.

empty.title: No API keys yet
empty.subtitle: Generate a key to call the TikFlow API from your own tools.

apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke "{label}"? Any client using this key will immediately stop working.

revokeError.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to revoke this key.
revokeError.UNEXPECTED: Something went wrong. Please try again.

new.cardSubtitle: Pick a descriptive label, choose scopes, and set an expiry. You'll see the key once.
new.label: Label
new.labelHelp: Helps your future self identify which integration this key belongs to.
new.scopesHelp: What this key can read. Keys ship read-only in this release — write scopes will be added per resource.
new.expiresAtHelp: Leave blank for no expiry. We strongly recommend a rotation date.

warning.title: The key shows up once
warning.body: After you submit, TikFlow displays the secret a single time. Copy it into your password manager or secrets store before closing this page.

errors.forbidden: Only workspace owners and admins can manage API keys.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

created.title: Your API key is ready
created.subtitle: "{label}" — copy the key below now. You won't see it again.

once.title: This is the only time the key will be shown
once.body: TikFlow stores a hash, not the original value. If you lose it, revoke the key and create a new one.

created.confirm: I've copied the key somewhere safe.

branding.cardSubtitle: Show your colours across the admin panel, customer portal, and invoices.
branding.accentColorHelp: Used for buttons, links, and focus rings throughout TikFlow.
branding.logoUrlHelp: Public HTTPS URL of your logo (SVG or PNG, transparent background). Replaces the TikFlow mark in the sidebar.
branding.invoicePrefixHelp: Up to 10 characters; uppercase letters, digits, and hyphens. Example: INV-
branding.invoiceHeaderHelp: Appears at the top of every invoice — typically your company name, address, and tax IDs.
branding.invoiceHeaderPlaceholder:
Acme Networks Ltd.
123 Fiber Street, Dhaka 1212
BIN: 0001234567
branding.invoiceFooterHelp: Appears at the bottom of every invoice — payment terms, support contact, thank-you note.
branding.invoiceFooterPlaceholder: Thank you for your business. Payment due within 14 days. Support: support@acme.net
branding.savedDesc: Your changes will appear on the next page load.

errors.forbidden: Only workspace owners and admins can change branding.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.
